questionHtml:
Now assume that the model is valid and that the mean number of snails per m2 is 0.2.

The gardener inspects, at random, a 12 m2 area of the park.

Suggest two observations that the gardener may have made that led him to suggest this model.
markschemeHtml:
slugs appear discretely / independently / randomly / at a constant (average) rate / mean is (approximately) equal to variance           R1R1

 

[2 marks]

meta.title: Suggest two observations that the gardener may have made that led him to suggest this model.
